title: Pufferfish Totem
description: This resource pack changes the Totem of Undying to a pufferfish.
body:
🐡 Pufferfish Totem

This simple and fun resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a pufferfish!
Now, when you cheat death, a pufferfish will save you instead 🐠✨

Features:

-Replaces the Totem of Undying model and texture with a pufferfish

-Works perfectly in both first-person and third-person views
